title: parts
description: Minimal set of parts needed to build a URDF for the input object.

object.description: Name of the object in the input image.

name.description: Short unique snake_case part name (used as image/GLB stem). Must be specific to the described component — not a vague label like body or main.

description.description: Factual, non-exaggerated description of the visible part: shape, color, material, and placement. No invented or internal details.

parent.description: Name of the parent part, or null for the root/base part.

joint_type.description: URDF joint type connecting this part to its parent.
